name.ja: <ruby>魔女の聖夜行<rt>ウィッチクラフト・ワルプルギース</rt></ruby>

text.en: During your Main Phase: You can add 1 "Witchcrafter" monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Witchcrafter Walpurgis" once per turn. During your turn, if you would discard to activate the effect of a "Witchcrafter" monster you control, you can send 1 "Witchcrafter" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY instead, except "Witchcrafter Walpurgis".
